biography: Don Creech (born October 30, 1948 in New York) is an American actor who has appeared in many television shows. He is mainly known for playing Mr. Sweeney, the science teacher in Ned's Declassified School Survival Guide and the snake oil merchant Nigel West Dickens in the 2010 video game Red Dead Redemption.
name: Don Creech
place_of_birth: New York City, New York, USA
